# mistershell_location (Data Source)

Reads a MisterShell location. Look up by id for a direct fetch, or use name/kind/parent_id to search. Search filters must match exactly one location.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Location ID. Use for direct lookup.
- `kind` (String) Location type filter: 'geo' or 'org'.
- `name` (String) Location name. Used as a search filter when id is not specified.
- `parent_id` (Number) Parent location ID. Used as a search filter when id is not specified.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Location description.
- `extra_data` (String) Additional metadata as JSON.
- `latitude` (Number) Geographic latitude.
- `longitude` (Number) Geographic longitude.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
